race.comment: DAITANNA (13) grows a leg for hoop Graham who has two wins from as many steers and is racing very consistently of late. Hard to knock mares in form and should be right there at the business end again. KEEP SAFE (4) resumes here but has tuned up for this with a recent trial victory and has a win and a second from three spins around this circuit. Sure to run a big race while fresh. The well-related FOR BETTER (15) (full to G1 winner Port Lockroy) saves her best form for this distance range and gets the services of Maloney in the irons. Can feature despite the sticky draw. VIALE (6) has placed two from two over this course and distance and gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim. In the mix. HE'S FOR THE GIRLS (2) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
